references.role: structural Licorn kitchen context for every Seedance segment
references.prompt: Use as structural kitchen continuity only: preserve cabinet layout, overall material language, lighting and Licorn kitchen identity. Do not force wide framing unless the segment asks for it.

references.role: primary plated-bowl island view and light terrazzo surface lock
references.prompt: Use to preserve the island surface, shallow bowl staging, countertop material and close plated-food context.

references.role: active overhead prep and spooning view
references.prompt: Use for top-down strawberry prep, salsa folding and overhead spooning while preserving the same island material.

references.role: final context view with Luma visible behind the finished dish
references.prompt: Use for the final Licorn kitchen context and presentation shot. Food remains foreground hero.

references.role: mixing, spreading, topping and scoop-shape continuity
references.prompt: Use only as spoon form reference for folding salsa, lifting whipped feta and shaping the feta spiral.

references.role: food processor or blending appliance shape for whipped feta transformation
references.prompt: Use only to anchor the compact blending appliance silhouette; the food action is whipping feta, cream cheese and honey.

references.role: Luma character identity and visible hand continuity
references.prompt: Use to preserve Luma identity and hand design. Character supports food action and should never replace the food as the hero.

references.role: top-down hand pose for overhead salsa prep
references.prompt: Use to keep visible hands readable during overhead chopping, sprinkling and folding actions.

references.role: three-quarter visible hand and bread-scoop pose support
references.prompt: Use to support visible hand staging during the bread scoop and appliance/spoon handling moments.

references.role: final presentation pose for Luma behind the island
references.prompt: Use for final presentation only; food stays in the foreground and remains the focal point.
Use only for a pleased, satisfied expression in the final kitchen context. Avoid exaggerated performance.

references.role: creator-provided desired final visual for dish styling and plating
references.prompt: Use the image at https://cdn.sanity.io/images/fl949yr7/production/ff687323573ae76187cc7d4e48e699d980e490e1-1024x1365.png?q=85&fit=clip&auto=format only as the desired final plating target: shallow bowl, white whipped feta base, central red strawberry salsa with herbs, toasted bread/chips nearby, glossy appetizing food-porn surface. Do not use it as a start/end keyframe pipeline.
